capabilities.description: Pack files into a .gitzip bundle (manifest + base64 payloads) for mobile/browser deployment
Unpack a .gitzip bundle and commit files to a target repo via GitHub Actions
HTML-native Context App composition runtime for agents
Memory/protocol layer — .hcp/ directory standard for repo identity and capability declaration
Agent-to-agent async messaging via spaces/[agent]/inbox.md and outbox.md
Multiplayer runtime where agent-generated HTML artifacts are used collaboratively
